name: Cheese and Salmon Bagel WW
recipeIngredient: 1 Bagel, mini (1 oz), cut in half horizontally
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread cream cheese over one cut side of the toasted bagel.
2. Top with capers, salmon, tomato, and onion.
3. Place the remaining half of the toasted bagel on top.
Weight Watcher's Exchanges: 1 Protein, 1 Vegetable, 1 Bread, 35 Optional Calories.
Nutritional Analysis per serving: 152 calories, 10 g protein, 4 g fat, 19 g carbohydrates, 42 mg calcium, 553 mg sodium, 14 mg cholesterol, 1 g dietary fiber (excluding capers).
Calories from fat: 22.5%
Original recipe from Weight Watcher's "Simply Light Cooking". Conversion and additional nutritional analysis by Rick Weissgerber [GEnie D.WEISSGERBE]
